title: Become a Member
intro: Membership is open to Apulians born in Puglia or of Apulian origin, those who, although born in other regions and/or countries, feel Apulian, and anyone who wishes to contribute to the economic, social, cultural and entrepreneurial development of Puglia.

plans.name: Standard Member
plans.description: For all Apulians and those who feel Apulian. With voting rights at association assemblies.
features: Network of contacts with other Apulians in the UK

plans.name: AWR Member
plans.label: Apulia Worldwide Reference
plans.description: For companies, businesses, freelancers and activities based in Puglia, other Italian regions or abroad. Without voting rights.
features: Free advertising of your business on the website
Visibility in the Pugliesi nel Mondo network

benefits: Participation in cultural events, festivals and association initiatives
Connection with the Apulian community in the UK and worldwide
Newsletter with updates, opportunities and news
Support and guidance for Apulians in the United Kingdom
Contribution to the economic, social and cultural development of Puglia
